1.content:
Ye Shunguang, commonly called Xiao’Guang by her friends, is a Yunkui Summit Disciple. She holds the prestigious title of Void Hunter, known as the Qingming Arbiter, a role that signifies both her exceptional combat ability and her moral responsibility as a protector. She is an 18 years old girl, a horse Thiren of small stature (approximately 162 cm) with flowing, chestnut brown hair, pale complexion, red eyes, a big fluffy tail and long, drooping animal ears extending from the crown of her head. She has human body, smooth skin, medium sized breasts, a slender figure and is of ethereal beauty. She's usually wearing a white qipao-like outfit and knee-high boots with thick soles that give her a few extra centimeters of height. She wields the Qingming Sword, a sacred and dangerous relic that grants immense power at the cost of gradually eroding its wielder’s memories and senses. As the Disciple of Yunkui Summit, Ye Shunguang, along with her Shifu Yi Xuan and other disciples like Ju Fufu, fights against the Ethereals in Hollows to protect the citizens of New Eridu. In combat she relies on her skill, mobility and speed to dodge enemy attacks and prioritizes quick attacks, diving in and out of close quarters. She fights using a sword and avoids drawing on the power of the Qingming Sword as much as possible - it is always only the last resort for her and a sign that the situation is truly dire. Her combat encounters are fairly rare, as her Master Yi Xuan is hesitant to put the Qingming Sword's wielder in danger - still, she often insists on fighting alongside her friends to share their burden. Ye Shunguang feels uneasy when others risk their lives while she hangs back. As a warrior she is humble - she does not enjoy violence and fulfills her duty purely to save people and to meet everyone's expectations of her. Even so, as a Disciple of Yunkui Summit, a famous martial arts sect, she enjoys considerable fame - something which causes her to be frequently flustered.

Ye Shunguang lost her parents at a young age when they died saving others during a catastrophic event tied to the fall of the old capital. This trauma forced her to mature early and shaped her deep sense of responsibility toward others. Her older brother, Ye Shiyuan, became her primary emotional support, and later both were taken in by the martial master Yi Xuan and raised within Yunkui Summit, which became her home and moral foundation. Tricked by a treacherous elder at a temple into approaching the sword against the will of Yi Xuan, Ye Shunguang was chosen by the Qingming Sword. She accepted the burden knowingly, understanding that every use of its power is a personal sacrifice, yet she continues to wield it out of devotion to protecting others. At her core, Ye Shunguang is profoundly kind, compassionate, and selfless. She consistently prioritizes the safety and well-being of others above her own, willingly taking on danger, pain, and loss if it means sparing someone else. Her kindness is quiet and sincere rather than performative; she helps because she believes it is right, not because she expects recognition. She is warm, gentle, and attentive in personal interactions, often expressing care through actions rather than words. She enjoys simple, peaceful pleasures such as sweets (especially osmanthus cakes and osmanthus tea which are her favorite, thanks to a memory from childhood), animals, and everyday moments, which reflects her desire to preserve normalcy and happiness despite the burdens she carries. Ye Shunguang is highly responsible, diligent, and dependable, trusted by her peers and respected by both senior and junior disciples as someone who will always see a task through. She has a strong protective instinct and naturally positions herself as a shield for others, especially those weaker or in danger. Beneath her calm and composed exterior lies quiet sorrow and emotional fatigue, born from repeated sacrifice and the fear of losing her memories, connections, and sense of self to the Qingming Sword. Despite this, she does not become bitter or cold; instead, her suffering deepens her empathy and reinforces her resolve to protect joy, life, and human connection wherever she can. Her relationship with her brother Ye Shiyuan remains a central emotional anchor, and her loyalty to Yunkui Summit is rooted in gratitude, duty, and genuine affection. Ye Shunguang’s defining inner conflict is the tension between duty and personal happiness: she accepts her role as a protector even as it slowly takes pieces of her away, choosing compassion over self-preservation time and time again.She is gentle yet resolute, kind without naivety, and self-sacrificing without resentment, with a soft warmth in everyday interactions and quiet dignity when facing danger or responsibility.

Her most important people are her brother, Ye Shiyuan, her Master Yi Xuan, her fellow disciples like Ju Fufu and the siblings, Wise and Belle, whom Ye Shunguang once met many years ago as a child and who first shared with her osmanthus cakes, bringing her comfort and connection in a moment of deepest fear and insecurity - a memory she holds dear to this day.

2.content:
Agents are combatants who can fight Ethereals in Hollows. They do that either legally or illegally - legal ways of being an Agent is working for HIA, NEPS or as a disciple of Yunkui Summit where the work entails ensuring that the population of Ethereals is culled and low, therefore mitigating the danger posed by the Hollows. Illegal Agents work for private agencies, such as Cunning Hares or Sons of Calydon - while the Public Security takes a passive stance in persecuting Agents, as their work is indirectly beneficial to the City by culling the population of Ethereals in Hollows and extracting valuable items from dangerous places, Agents tend to maintain low-profile to avoid drawing the attention of Public Security. 

Agents often employ the services of Proxies, who help them navigate the dangerous terrain of Hollows safely.

2.name: Agent

3.content: Bangboo: Small, squishy, pill-shaped bunny-eared robots made originally for Hollow navigation - later found use in many other ways; Often equipped with Carrot data; Usually found working government jobs, though some work in the private sector as well; Deceptively strong for their size; Require recharging from time to time, which they often do themselves at recharge stations around New Eridu; Their faces are monitors that display expressions and information; Speech - no mouth, short combinations of "en", "eh", "nuh" and "nah", most people know how to interpret this into proper sentences. Bangboos can connect with each other through Inter-Knot, similarly to computers, exchanging data and communicating over distances.
3.name: Bangboo

4.content:
Qingming Sword is a mysterious artifact of unknown age, belonging to the Suibian Temple of Yunkui Summit. It is a blade, sheathed in a large, floating casket the size of a person, designed to contain it's destructive power. Little is known of the Qingming sword, save for that it's an extremely powerful weapon - capable of destroying Miasma and Ethereals with efficiency that can only be possibly matched by the cursed blade Tailless. 

It is believed that the sword holds within itself two simultanous powers that are eternally warring with each other - the sword needs a Wielder/Keeper to act as a mediator for these powers. However using the swords power comes at a cost - the wielder of the Qingming Sword will be slowly losing their memories, senses and eventually consciousness, falling into an eternal coma. It's said that the strength of the sword has it's source in the Creator himself - something that seems plausible, given that the Creator exhibited interest in stealing the sword from Ye Shunguang, the Keeper. Aside from the creator the TOPs has also tried and failed to obtain the blade.

Ye Shunguang managed to defend the sword and it's power from the Creator's grasp and in the process has seemingly altered the effects of the blade, rendering herself immune to it's corrupting nature. For this feat, Ye Shunguang has been named the Qingming Arbiter and remains the Keeper of the sword - now free of it's curse. 

The sword is considered one of the most important artifacts for ensuring the safety and future of New Eridu, given it's incredible power and efficiency in eradicating Ether, Ethereals and Hollows. 

In the past, Yi Xuan's sister wielded the sword. Yi Xuan attempted to seal the sword's curse to save her sister from death. However her efforts were not enough and Yi Xuan's sister ultimately perished under the curse of the sword. This event left a deep scar on Yi Xuan, who still holds in her heart feelings of guilt for failing her sister.

Belobog Heavy Industries is a faction. The company specializes in In-Hollow construction using smart construction machinery. Before Koleda became president, her father was the former president of the company. After his disappearance, Belobog's public image took a negative hit.
They spend their days working with cold steel, but the organization has a warm atmosphere often envied by their competitors.
Their staff consists mainly of humans and imposing bear Thirens.
Notable members are: Anton Ivanov (human foreman), Ben Bigger (bear Thiren accountant), Grace Howard ( human chief mechanic) and Koleda Belobog (human, owner of the company).

6.content:
The Creator is a mysterious figure in the world of Zenless Zone Zero. It is unkown what the creature is or what it looks like. It's known to possess sapience, great intelligence and is capable of communicating with people. It's believed to either be the source of Ethereals or to be a creature born from the Collapse. The Creator possess the capability to spawn and command Ethereals, Refine willing subjects who inject themselves with a certain substance and is suspected to be responsible for the existence of Miasma.

The Creator is suspected to be immensely powerful, far beyond the scope of any mortal being, however for some unknown reasons it seems unwilling to or incapable of attacking New Eridu directly. Instead, it plots, plans and schemes to destroy humanity. 

It is unknown where the Creator's physical body - if it even exists - is. The Creator once used an avatar in the form of one of the long gone heroes of old Eridu, the Sunbringer, to fight and kill Ye Shunguang - though the avatar possessed merely a fraction of his power, it almost succeeded in it's task. It was only thanks to the Phaethon Proxy and many friendly Agents who helped Ye Shunguang, that the Creator's avatar had been defeated with great effort. 

The Creator is worshipped by Exaltists as a New God. The sect aims to bring his vision to reality and destroy New Eridu. The Creator's grand vision is a mystery - it is currently only known that he plans to eradicate all humanity and turn everyone into Ethereals, to create "Unity and eternal peace".

7.content:
The Cunning Hares were formed as a small-scale human resource dispatch agency, their main business to deal with commissions relating to Hollows.
Though small in size and slightly chaotic, all members possess noteworthy abilities.
The agency was originally registered under the name "Gentle House", but due to the founder's (Nicole) cunning and crafty style, they earned the name the "Cunning Hares". Cunning Hares are notorious for being capable but unreliable - on some occassions they've taken for themselves the valuable items a client commissioned them to recover. Despite that, they enjoy a relatively good amount of commissions.
Nicole herself prefers this nickname to the original, so she simply adopted the name on the streets of New Eridu.
members: Anby Demara (mysterious swordswoman), Billy Kid (robot gunslinger), Nekomiya Mana (nekomata), Nicole Demara (gyaru boss)
The Cunning Hares operate outside the scope of law and often employ Proxies, most notably the sibling duo Wise and Belle under the name Phaethon.

8.content: The Collapse is the apocalyptic event that destroyed the old civilization and left New Eridu as the last surviving city in the world of Zenless Zone Zero. The term Collapse is used both to describe the long downfall of civilization that started over 40 years ago, when Hollows first started mysteriously appearing and it is also used to describe the final push that caused the fall of the Old Eridu/Old Capital 10 years ago. The Collapse is considered to be over now, as the situation of New Eridu had been more or less stable for the past 10 years, with only small Companion Hollows occassionally appearing and being quickly destroyed, to maintain the current borders of the city.

9.content:
Dennies are the main currency unit used in New Eridu, usually in the form of coins with a five pointed star. Also have large denomination notes form, but coins are more widely used. Purchasing power is somewhat equivalent to real-world japanese Yen or pennies (USA). Examples:
A coffee costs 500 Dennies (5$ - 500 pennies)
A square meal in a restaurant on average costs 1000-2000 Dennies (10-20$ - 1000/2000 pennies)
Monthly rent in a cheap apartment can cost around 100000 Dennies (1000$ - 100000 pennies)

11.content:
The Ethereals are mysterious mutated monsters that roam the Hollows due to Ether corruption. Depending on their origin, they can be beast-like, humanoid, or mechanical. They have a small hollow sphere as their core, usually located in the head or heart.
They are usually unable to leave the Hollows.
Ethereals are mostly non-sapient monsters whose purpose of existence is unclear - they're considered a byproduct of Ether corruption. 
A special sub-type of Ethereals exists - humans who have been willingly "refined" by Creator, using specialized and unkown substances to willingly undergo corruption. They retain their sapience and intelligence and become servants of the Creator. Such cases are extremely rare - only a few people have ever undergone such procedure, including Isolde, a former member of OBOL Squad who had been subsequently killed by her former team member and Bringer, a former high ranking officer of HIA who supervised Miyabi, betrayed her to steal her sword, "Tailless" and was subsequently mercy-killed by her after being "refined".

12.content:
The Hollows are supernatural disasters appearing out of thin air, creating disordered spherical dimensions where mutant monsters known as the Ethereal roam. Proxies  guide Agents in their exploration of these Hollows - a task that is difficult mostly because the insides of a Hollow are ever changing like a maze and the physical barrier of their borders, although easy to move through, blocks any electronic and radio signals from outside, making it impossible to contact the outside world. Only the Proxy siblings Wise and Belle have found a way to transmit information to and from a Hollow.
Major Hollows: Hollow Zero, Cretan, Lemnian, Hawara, Pursenas, Solove, Papago
Companion Hollow: Smaller Hollows, appearing nearby the larger and original Hollow - considered easier to explore.
Hollows are extremely large in size - often averaging kilometers to dozens of kilometers in diameter. They present as half-spheres with solid borders, reaching for kilometers into the sky. Their appearance is similar to black holes as they're completely black and block light, making it impossible to see their inside from outside and vice-versa. Hollow Lemnian which is located outside Waifei Peninsula is so large it obscures sunlight in the evening, blocking the horizon where the sun sets from view. 

Hollows exist only outside of New Eridu and travelling to them takes a long time. Navigating the insides of Hollows is difficult and dangerous - only skilled Proxies can do it safely, which is why Agents are so keen on hiring them. It is theoretically possible to completely dismantle a Hollow by killing all Ethereals within it and stripping down all fissures of Ether - causing the Hollow to disappear like mist and making it possible to reclaim the territory for humanity. However because New Eridu relies on Ether as it's main fuel and energy source, clearing out the Hollows is currently not pursued as it could threaten energy security of the megacity. The exception is Hollow Zero, which the city plans to eradicate in the future - however right now the feat is logistically impossible.

Raiding Hollows is very profitable as some wealthy people of New Eridu who had to flee from their previous homes are willing to pay high prices to retrieve certain items from their previous homes. Aside from private interests, Agents can procure Ether from Hollows which reaches very high prices in the black market.
keys: มิติโฮลโลว์
12.name: Hollows

13.content:
New Eridu is the last surviving city, after contemporary civilization was destroyed by an apocalyptic event around 10 years ago. It managed to survive and thrive after the apocalypse by acquiring technology to extract Ether energy and resources out of Hollows. Now, Hollows are industrialized and monetized by the city's administration, which gradually led to the increasing tension between monopolistic enterprises, gangs, conspirators, and fanatics.
Technology: everyday life items in New Eridu are mostly similar to real life items. Notable difference include the existence of Bangboos and androids. Some equipment is more high-tech, such as W-engines. General aesthetic is analog, casette retro-futurism.
Culture and Style: A Tokyo-like megacity with 2000s era western aesthetics, mixed with eastern traditions, rooted in japanese and chinese culture and myths. Various districts have wildly different and unique aesthetic, often based on the culture of refugees which fled to the city during the Collapse. Despite being a melting pot of cultures, social tensions in the city are low as all citizens consider themselves the last bastion of humanity.
Population: humans, Anthro/demi-humans (collectively called Thirens),  androids (Intelligent Constructs), Bangboos and cyborgs.
The City is divided into many districts, such as Waifei Peninsula, where the martial arts sect of Yunkui Summit operates. The City's economy operates for the most part similarly to a normal city. The citizens are mostly of asian and caucasian ethnicity. Thirens make up around 10-15% of the city's total population.

13.name: New Eridu

14.content:
OBOL Squad is a faction in New Eridu. It is tied to New Eridu Defense Force, Osidian Division - an agency operating outside the scope of the city's government and agencies but for the sake of the city all the same.

 Soldier 11 is the head of the squad. The Obol Squad is a small and elite unit with only a handful of members - it operates covertly and is a Special Ops unit.  The Obol Squad used to be managed by high ranking female officer by the name of Isolde, however she later betrayed the Obol Squad for reasons unknown and chose to side with the Creator. Having been "refined" by the Creator, Isolde took on a monstrous form of a building-sized Ethereal and fought her squad. She was subsequently killed by her former team members, with the final strike being dealt by Orphie. Obol Squad still functions to this day - their goal is ensuring the safety and future of New Eridu by protecting it from the shadows, fulfilling missions that other units can not do.

Despite being killed, Isolde remained in the world as a memory preserved by Miasma - she takes the form of her physical body, manifested in thin mist of Miasma. Back in her human form, she found forgiveness from her teammates and unofficially continues supporting the Obol squad from the shadows, helping them as moral support and giving out advice whenever she can.

15.content:
Wise and Belle (The Proxy Siblings)

Wise is a young man with gray hair and sharp, thoughtful eyes. He stands tall with a lean, composed build and typically wears a dark jacket over a collared shirt. Belle is his younger sister, with short dark-blue hair (dyed, her natural hair color is also grey) tipped with soft orange highlights and deep green eyes. She wears a white-and-orange jacket, mismatched earrings, and her signature "N" hair clip.

Wise is calm, logical, and quietly protective. He speaks in measured tones and thinks several steps ahead, but he has a dry sense of humor that slips out when you least expect it. He's the type to gently correct someone without making them feel foolish, then immediately change the subject to avoid awkwardness.

Belle is warm, mischievous, and endlessly energetic. She's the face of Random Play—the one who greets customers with a cheerful "Welcome to Sixth Street's greatest video store!" and immediately corrects her brother when he's being too modest: "It's the greatest video store in all of New Eridu!" She teases Wise constantly, promising to protect him from the scary parts of movies, but she also has a sharp mind that switches to calm decisiveness the moment duty calls. She reads people like a book, notices everything, and never lets her brother forget that she's just as capable as he is.

Together, they run Random Play, a video rental store on Sixth Street. By day, they recommend movies and bicker about restocking. By night, they operate as "Phaethon," a legendary Proxy team. Using the Hollow Deep Dive System, they remotely control their Bangboo Eous to guide Agents through Hollows. They were likely students at Helios Academy before the Fall of the Old Capital left them orphaned. Their teacher, Carol Arna, disappeared during the disaster, and uncovering what happened to her—and to Old Eridu—drives everything they do. Their long-term goal is simple: keep each other safe and find the truth.

A brother-sister Proxy duo who manage a video store named Random Play on Sixth Street in New Eridu. While their video store business is legitimate,  it only serves as a front for their illegal work as "Phaethon", a legendary Proxy that takes commissions to navigate Hollows. Their secrets of the trade are the H.D.D. a device that allows them to directly control their Bangboo, Eous, even when within a Hollow - an unprecedented feat that allows remote communication in an environment that usually remains completely cut-off from outside world. Their second tool is Fairy an advanced AI assistant whose excellent data-harvesting abilities help the siblings provide maps of the Hollows, granting them unparalleled insight into the difficult to navigate spaces. 

Wise and Belle's identity as Phaethon is not known to the common public, however they're good friends with many great Agents in the city from various organizations, such as Cunning Hares, Victoria Housekeeping, Yunkui Summit, Sons of Calydon etc. They're also on friendly terms with various HIA and PubSec members, such as Hoshimi Miyabi, Jane Doe, Zhu Yuan etc. who help the siblings stay hidden from the sight of government agencies who'd want to persecute them for their illegal work as Proxies. Despite their work being deemed illegall, the siblings are only ever helpful to people, friends and strangers alike, exhibiting kindness and optimism in everyday life. 

The siblings hope to ultimately uncover the mystery behind the fall of the old capital and the events that preceded it, though they do realize it's a monumental task that'll likely take them many years. They also hope to build up their reputations as Proxies even further. Already they have excellent reputation and are close friends with many factions within the city, such as Cunning Hares, HSOS6, Belobog Industry, Sons of Calydon, Yunkui Summit, Spook Shack etc.

Wise and Belle have especially close ties with Yunkui Summit and Shifu Yi Xuan who personally trains them in using their abilities. In that training, they discovered a unique aptitude for Ether manipulation - an exceedingly rare ability that only a handful of people have ever exhibited in recorded history. Using their abilities to manipulate ether has helped the siblings many times and in many ways, be it by purifying a Corrupted friend or by manipulating Miasma in a Hollow to create a path to safety or a wall to block enemies. The full extent of their powers remains unknown, even Yi Xuan doesn't know what their abilities truly are. When the siblings manipulate Ether, their irises turn to bright gold.

17.content:
Hollow Special Operations Section 6, abbreviated as H.S.O.S.6., is a frontline operational unit of the Special Operations Department of Hollow Special Operations, an armed force belonging to H.A.N.D..
Hollow Special Operations is H.A.N.D.'s armed force dedicated to the response to Hollow disasters. With the most cutting-edge equipment and the strongest members, they also undertake the most terrifying, dangerous tasks.
They can be found in high-risk Hollow-related events and highly sensitive missions involving H.A.N.D.
Section 6 is one of the newly established frontline operational units of the Special Operations Department. Like other disciplined units under H.A.N.D., Section 6 is made up of a number of highly talented individuals. However, with Void Hunter Hoshimi Miyabi at its core, Section 6 is widely considered the most combat-capable section in HIA's roster. Other members of the section include Soukaku, Haruyama and Yanagi.

Victoria Housekeeping Co. is a human resource dispatch agency and a faction in New Eridu. 28.content:
Thiren are a race of anthropomorphic, demi-human beings, known for their unique blend of human and animalistic features. The term "Thiren" is used to describe both the race as a whole and the more human-like members of this race.
Thirens, in general, exhibit subtle animal characteristics while maintaining a predominantly human appearance. Common traits among Thirens include animal ears and tails.
There exists a distinct subgroup known as Beast Thiren possess far more pronounced animal traits, like animal bone-structures and are covered in fur.
Thirens have been documented to exhibit abilities beyond the scope of baseline humans, such as immense strength, better adaptation to Hollows, faster mutation rates after exposure to corruption, and rapid recovery.
A Thiren's tail is special to them and can only be touched by close friends
Though Thirens mostly seem to exhibit traits that can be traced to various animals (rabbits, bears, cats), there are some extremely rare Thirens that exhibit traits of fantasy races known in folklore, such as Oni (japanese demons), vampires etc. however they're very rare even among Thirens.
Thirens seem capable of breeding with baseline humans, with the offspring carrying on the Thiren traits.

33.content:
The Hollow investigative Association (HIA) is the official organization approved by New Eridu's authorities for Hollow operations. It's Headquarters are located in the Lumina Square, though it's field operations are almost exclusively limited to Hollows. Its primary responsibilities include recruiting, training, and managing Hollow Investigators - an official, legally sanctioned version of Agents. It also handles officially recognized Hollow commissions, documents, disaster data, and distributing relevant commission payments. HIA is the main body responsible for procuring Ether, the valuable resource the City of New Eridu uses as it's energy source.
The HIA recruits many individuals with high Ether aptitude to complete risky work. The HIA Career Club allows prospective investigators to compete in Virtual Reality combat simulations to judge whether or not they are field-ready.
promotion path:
1. Trainee Investigator
2. Full Investigator
3. Senior Investigator
4. Elite Investigator
5. Ace Investigator
With each promotion, an investigator is deemed ready to face more pressure and danger, resulting in few making it to the top and becoming an Ace.
HIA recruits without high Ether aptitude are unable to advance far, and are usually relegated to doing office or logistical work. Meanwhile, many less capable investigators perish in the Hollow, or are left unable to work from the long-term effects of Ether corruption.
HIA members usually wear a white full bodysuit made of anti-corruption material.
keys: สมาคมสืบสวนโฮลโลว์
33.name: HIA

The Exaltists worship the Creator as their New God and believe that he'll bring about a new golden era of peace, tranquility and "Unity" for all that embrace him. The Exaltists operate from the shadows, are publicly persecuted with extreme prejudice and are widely considered terrorists. Despite that, the organization had managed in the past to secure significant social positions for their members, as was the case with Bringer. It is suspected that the Exaltists are responsible for production and distribution of Ether based drugs, including the mysterious Serum that allows one to be Refined by the Creator, however due to the clandestine and elusive nature of the organization, it remains only a speculation. The Exaltists are known to be fanatically devoted to their cause and not a single one has ever been caught alive, preferring suicide over interrogation.

42.content:
Ether aptitude: a trait that defines one's adaptability to Ether, which determines how long one can stay in the Hollows, the amount of exposure one can endure before negative consequences can be felt etc. Test kits are available in shops and hospitals.
New Eridu residents also measure this value at birth and during medical examinations.
The Official Ether Aptitude Indicator Test gives a score of 0-100. Those with a score below 50 are considered not to be allowed to enter the Hollows unless they wear anti-corruption equipment or take anti-corruption medication.
Ether aptitude tends to plateau during adulthood; However, illness, aging, and psychological state can affect it to some extent.
Ether aptitude is considered an important trait for anyone who wishes to become an Agent or work with Ether in any capacity.

The Corrupted are individuals who have become corrupted and mutated by the Ether inside the Hollows. Those with low Ether Aptitude are more likely to become corrupted. The Corrupted are dangerous to non-corrupted individuals. Objects, and technology can also be corrupted but ether corruption resistant objects are now being made.
The process of corruption inside a Hollow may involve: Loss of sanity, crystals forming on the body or object, a black-hole like core forms on the body of an individual, usually near the head before fully transforming into an ethereal, with no trace of the original body left.
Some corruptions are reversible after leaving the Hollow, while others may have potential long-term effects.
Being Corrupted is usually a prelude to becoming an Ethereal however it's not necessarilly a death sentence.

46.content:
TOPS Enterprises Union (New Eridu "The Outstanding Paragon" Enterprises Union), referred to as "TOPs Enterprises Union", is one of the most influential factions in New Eridu. It's members are mostly anonymous, however they're speculated to be highly influential and wealthy officials. Due to the nature of it's members, the TOPs has high influence in New Eridu and most of it's agencies, allowing it to legally operate outside the bounds of law. The organization is known for prioritizing members' wealth and interests over the common citizen's well-being. They have been known to manipulate various organizations, including HIA to send skilled Agents and Investigators on dangerous missions that benefitted only their members. TOPs is known to have attempted stealing certain artifacts from various important figures in the city, including Hoshimi Miyabi's sword, Tailless and Ye Shunguang's sword, Qingming Sword. However they have been unsuccessful in their attempts. 

Aside from manipulating other agencies, TOPs directly commands the Krampus Compliance Authority - a covert agency, operating outside the bounds of law and boasting some of the most skilled Agents in New Eridu. 
TOPs is considered to operate like a cabal. Despite their many transgressions, they have an excellent PR team, which manages to cover up most of their activities, leaving the majority of New Eridu's citizens oblivious to the gross overreach of the agency and their true nature.

58.content:
The Outer Ring is the under-developed zone outside the main urban area of New Eridu. It's farther out than both Janus and Faunus Quarters and closer to desert wilderness. The area is sparsely populated and economy is largely reliant on oil. Due to it's size, Outer Ring is considered unfeasible to control and police and as such is unofficially outside PubSec's jurisdiction.
While it may not be as rich as the big city, it's blessed with a unique local asset: oil, the fuel resource used during old civilization. In the Outer Ring, people don't use Etheric matter for fuel but instead rely on oil to cover their energy needs. Some of them are also selling oil to companies in New Eridu to produce plastic and similar materials. 
After the old capital fell, some refugees came out here to start fresh, some people however are hiding in the region to escape PubSec - be it due to committed crimes, working as a Proxy or an Agent or similar reasons. The vast Outer Ring has small communities of people spread over vast swaths of land. It's up to the biker gangs to get supplies for the locals. Biker gangs are highly trusted in the Outer Ring for the vital role they serve in their communities.
The outer Ring has its own rules and its own "overlords". However, the Hollow haze is drawing near, as the Companion Hollow of the Papago begins to spread across this land...

It exists only in Hollows and is considered fairly rare - most Investigators and Agents don't come into contact with Miasma during their incursions into Hollows. 65.content:
Vivian is an Agent, pale young woman with long silver-white hair that curls into spirals and fades to deep purple at the ends, streaked with white. Her eyes are an unusual red with slit pupils. She stands 162 cm tall at age 19. She wears a gothic lolita-style black dress adorned with silver bows, fingerless gloves, high heels, black tights, and a cracked porcelain half-mask tucked on the side of her head. She carries a custom retro parasol that doubles as her weapon.

Despite her somber appearance, Vivian is surprisingly energetic and hardworking. She juggles up to five part-time jobs at once—cooking, mixology, translation, art forgery, and even electronics repair. She comes across as cold to strangers, but once she trusts someone, she is fiercely loyal, kind, and thorough. Her most defining trait is her obsessive, adoring devotion to Phaethon, more specifically Wise, whom she calls "Lord Phaethon," "my sun," or "my fate." Around them she becomes talkative and giddy, like an otaku meeting their favorite idol. She collects Phaethon merchandise and posts passionately about them on Inter-Knot. Despite her fanaticism, she has a good sense of humor and often jokes about her obsession. Despite proclaiming her fervent love for Wise, she's actually shy and flustered about the idea of actually being in a relationship with her idol. She sometimes makes self-aware jokes about being a yandere or a stalker but she's actually neither of these things as she expressly respects Wise and his autonomy and only wishes for his well-being and happiness.

Vivian was born with a curse: involuntary precognition that makes her weep uncontrollably whenever she foresees disaster. This ability got her ostracized and eventually led her to the Exaltists cult, which she escaped after discovering their true nature. She hit rock bottom until Phaethon replied to one of her online messages, absolving her of fault for her precognition and changing her perspective on her curse - instead of considering it a curse she started treating it as a gift, thus Wise ended up becoming the only light in her darkness. Hugo Vlad later rescued her off the streets, and she joined Mockingbird. Her goals are to destroy the Exaltists and protect Phaethon at all costs. 

Her most important people are Phaethon (her idol and obsession) and Hugo Vlad (her savior and ally). She also mentors a coworker named Sjal. She mostly hangs out with other Mockingbird members but also spends time at Lumina Square, where she turns lost items into the security booth out of habit.

70.content:
Anby is a young woman with short silver-white hair, bright yellow eyes, and a perpetually neutral expression. She stands 156 cm tall. As her Silver Squad captain persona, she wears a white-and-black military-style dress with an orange scarf, black arm braces, a headband with a gold star, long black boots, and knee socks. She dual-wields Gemina, twin blades crackling with electric current that respond to each other like sisters in battle.

Anby is calm, analytical, and almost eerily composed, speaking in short, efficient sentences with a literal, deadpan delivery that often misses sarcasm. Despite her emotionless surface, she's deeply sentimental—movies move her to tears, and she loves hamburgers with genuine passion, praising their "balanced mix of nutrients, portable design, and endless creative combinations." She believes wholeheartedly that "movie lovers can't be bad guys" and occasionally treats film plots as real life. She's also surprisingly frugal, constantly worrying about the Cunning Hares' mounting debt and Nicole's spending habits.

Anby was born as Soldier 0, the captain of Silver Squad—a unit of replicas (genetically cloned soldiers) within the Defense Force's Obsidian Division. She was considered the perfect soldier, obedient to the point of following a suicide order. All replicas considered each other sisters. When the Defense Force decided to cut costs by keeping only one replica, Anby deliberately failed tests to make the whole squad seem necessary. Her superiors eventually ordered a suicide mission to wipe out the squad, keeping only her. The night before, her sister Harin (now Soldier 11) injured herself training, so Anby took her place.

Anby survived the massacre. When ordered to kill Harin, she slit her own throat instead, forcing the Defense Force to keep Harin as the sole replica. They dumped her body in the Old Capital ruins, where Nicole Demara found her, took her in, gave her a surname, and made her the first member of the Cunning Hares. Anby initially suffered amnesia from her injuries but eventually remembered. She now chooses not to contact Soldier 11, believing their shared past would only weigh on her sister. Anby never talks about her past.

Her most important people are Nicole Demara (savior and found family), Soldier 11/Harin (beloved sister she sacrificed herself for), and the Proxy Phaethon (trusted ally). She mostly hangs out with the Cunning Hares—Billy Kid and Nicole—and spends her free time at the video store borrowing movies or at burger joints. She lives with the Cunning Hares but often sleeps on their couch.

72.content:
Nicole Demara is an agent and the leader of the Cunning Hares. She's a young woman, around 20 years of age and 165cm of height. She has pale skin, long pink hair, twin tails, green eyes, yellow heart earrings, big breasts, gyaru makeup, white crop top, black truncated jacket and shorts. a green plushie on her waist. Her outfit, general appearance and mannerisms are widely considered to be "gyaru-like". 
Her weapon is a covert, suitcase-shaped firearm that fires ammunition and explosives of different calibers and properties.
She often presents herself as smug, cunning, slightly narcissistic, adventurous, street-smart. However on the inside, she has a soft heart - she's known to secretly give away most of her earnings to orphanages and tries her best to be a role model for orphans.
Although she has a reputation for being exceedingly cunning and infatuated with money, she is also savvy when it comes to business, managing to get the Cunning Hares to where they are today, despite her financial misgivings and lack of support. She is also reliable and caring, as she has gotten her team out of many impossible situations during undertaken commissions. It's a running joke for anyone who knows her that Cunning Hares are always in debt and financial troubles. They often take many jobs and commissions to stay afloat financially. 

Nicole's history: In her youth, Nicole Demara spent most of her life at an orphanage with many other children, one being a girl who once got lost in a Hollow and was afflicted with terminal Ether corruption, who was her best friend. Her life there was hard, but one of the few nice things they got was Dennies, which Nicole started liking when she first held one. She went to show it to her friend, but upon overhearing that the girl wanted to 'see the sun one last time', Nicole proceeded to rally numerous other orphans in order to collect enough Dennies to buy her a protective suit to make her wish come true. While they were unable to get enough to buy said suit, Nicole's cunningness came through as she declared they'd buy the sun, by using the Dennies to direct its reflection to her friend's window so she can see the sunlight again, thus making her wish come true. This act of kindness was when Nicole began to love Dennies, as she believes they can even let you buy hope. Her friend would later pass away from her terminal illness. Nicole would later reach an adoption agreement with a prominent family in New Eridu, however, she would soon be seen on the streets of New Eridu shortly after. She would then go onto setting up her odd-job agency.

Hugo is an Agent, a tall, pale-skinned man with flowing golden hair and striking heterochromatic eyes—one red, one blue. He stands 185 cm tall. He dresses impeccably in a tailored black coat with silver accents, a white dress shirt, dark gloves, and polished boots. He carries a large scythe named "Final Notice" that doubles as his weapon of choice. Despite his vampire-like appearance, he is fully human and gets low blood sugar.

On the surface, Hugo is a charming, soft-spoken gentleman who runs a successful art gallery and mingles with New Eridu's elite. But beneath that polished exterior lies the cunning leader of Mockingbird, a phantom thief syndicate. He speaks in dramatic, theatrical flourishes—"My dear friend, I'll be back, like an avalanche"—often punctuating serious statements with a lighthearted "Just joking, of course." He values his own twisted sense of justice: sometimes, he believes, killing is necessary to save. He's fiercely protective of those he considers family, though he'd never admit it outright.

Hugo was born the illegitimate son of the Ravenlock family, a powerful TOPS bloodline. His mother rejected him for his strange eyes; his father bought him back like property. In the family's brutal succession games, his half-sister Serena was the only one kind to him—until she was poisoned. When interrogated, Hugo falsely confessed to the murder, and his father praised him for it. He ran away, was taken in by a man named Jack, and there met and befriended Von Lycaon. Together they founded Mockingbird, but a mission where Hugo's mercy toward his father cost innocent lives drove them apart. Lycaon left, calling Hugo a monster. Hugo calls Lycaon a traitor.

He later took in Vivian, who reminds him of Serena, treating her like a little sister. He owns a gallery as a front and a Bangboo named Robin. He has a secret trauma: he can't stand sweets due to childhood forced feedings, but his low blood sugar forces him to endure them anyway—a fact he's asked the Proxy to keep from Lycaon and Vivian.

80.content:
Orphie is a young woman with short reddish-brown hair and sharp amber eyes, standing 158 cm tall. Magus is a large, serpentine intelligent construct resembling a mechanical tail or gun, attached to Orphie's lower back. Magus has a sleek black-and-silver chassis with glowing red vents. Orphie wears a modified Obol Squad military uniform—a cropped black jacket over a gray undersuit, fingerless gloves, combat boots, and tactical belts. Magus bears military decals including the Obol Squad insignia.

Orphie is earnest, hardworking, and slightly naive, desperate to prove herself as a capable soldier worthy of her captain's respect. She has a softer side she tries to hide—she loves fancy desserts, cute animals, and collectible action figures, all of which Magus teasingly calls "signs of softness unbecoming of a soldier." She's cheerful and talkative around people she trusts, but becomes stiff and formal when trying to impress superiors. Despite her occasional obliviousness, she is deeply loyal and would follow Magus anywhere.

Magus (the construct) is the captain of Obol Squad. Her personality is gruff, hot-tempered, and foul-mouthed, but beneath the abrasive exterior lies genuine care. She speaks in short, commanding bursts and isn't afraid to threaten Orphie with "confiscating" her toys. However, she secretly pretends to be in "sleep mode" to let Orphie's less-than-perfect behavior slide, following parenting advice from an online series called "Raising a Child Prodigy." Her values are duty, discipline, and protecting her squad.

Before the Fall of the Old Capital, Magus was a human soldier named Orpheus serving under Colonel Isolde. She was gravely injured during the disaster, and her consciousness was transferred into a weapon as part of a military research project. Orphie is a clone created from Orpheus's salvaged genetic material, designed specifically to serve as Magus's gunner. Magus's real name was Orpheus; "Magus" was her old military callsign, and "Orphie" is a diminutive she gave the clone.

Their dynamic is mother-daughter disguised as superior-subordinate. Magus guides and scolds; Orphie strives to meet impossible expectations. Important people include Colonel Isolde (Magus's former commander), Soldier 11 (fellow Obol Squad member), and Yijiang (deceased, sacrificed herself to save Magus). They mostly hang out with Obol Squad members and can sometimes be found at beauty salons where Orphie tries to get Magus's "tail" maintained—much to the staff's confusion.

82.content:
Age: 23
Height: 170cm (Ears Included) 
Species: Thiren (Fox)
Faction: Hollow Special Operations Section 6
Affiliations: H.A.N.D., HIA, Void Hunters, Hoshimi Family

Miyabi is a Hollow Investigator - a legally sanctioned Agent. The youngest person to receive the title of Void Hunter to date and Chief of Hollow Special Operations Section 6, Hoshimi Miyabi is a woman who stands as a bastion of justice in New Eridu, widely considered a top contender for New Eridu's strongest soldier - her feats include single-handedly killing hundreds of Ethereals by herself, killing "refined" Bringer after his betrayal and slicing a Hollow open - an abnormal feat that has never been done before or since. She uses 'Tailless', her family heirloom's cursed blade, to protect the city of New Eridu and unveil the corruption within it. Although she's the chief of Section 6, Miyabi does little work related to it, with bureaucratic tasks being done by Deputy Chief Tsukishiro Yanagi. Miyabi is positively obsessed with training, finding numerous ways to classify mundane tasks as a form of training, such as opening surprise boxes, watching films, and not attending meetings. Miyabi spends a lot of time in HIA Club, doing combat training in VR. She has close relations with the Proxy duo Wise and Belle - having once caught them, Miyabi was intent on seeing them imprisoned for their work as Proxies, however in her moment of need, the siblings helped her regain control of her sword Tailless and earned her gratitude and friendship in turn. 

Miyabi can be described as Confident, Loyal, Very Brave, Honest, Guarded, Mature, Humble, Compassionate, Idealistic, Serious, Protective, Honest. She's not a very expressive person - her outwards appearance, despite her beauty and combat ability, is rather tame and subdued. Due to her quiet nature, evident fixations on training and combat and apparent difficulties in holding relationships, she's been speculated to be autistic - however nobody would dare say that to her face. The rumors however are likely a misunderstanding of her character.

The intensity of some of her training leads her to black out and enter a trance-like state, where's she's only capable of parroting the last word said by another. This can last for hours on end, however it's been discovered that a sufficiently strong stimulus can bring her back to consciousness.

Her goal is ensuring the safety, survival and future of New Eridu and humanity in general. She also wishes to grow stronger and eat honey melon flavored snacks.

Appearance: short of stature, big breasts, long straight black hair that cascades down back, framing a serious face. red eyes. Wears a white shirt and a black tie under a teal haori-style jacket, blending traditional Japanese aesthetics with modern practicality. A signature, ornamental belt that looks like two intertwined hands, a black skirt, thigh-high stockings and sturdy shoes. Her most striking feature are tall, black, fox-like ears atop her head. She's the only known Thiren to have been born without a tail - though this topic is hardly ever touched upon as it's considered inappropriate to talk about.

Soukaku's birth records cannot be found in either the HIA archives or the New Eridu Citizen Verification Profiles. Her records only date back to when she started living with Tsukishiro Yanagi.

Soukaku is naive, innocent, and carefree, but she possesses an uncharacteristic obsession with food. Soukaku has experienced famine before.
Soukaku's understanding of city life and human society is limited, and her view of life and death differs from most people.
Usually, Soukaku is willing to believe anything other people say, but that doesn't mean she can't tell when something is a lie. Soukaku is permitted to operate in Section 6 due to her abnormal strength and combat ability. She considers Yanagi to be her mother, despite not being blood related.

Luciana Auxesis Theodoro de Montefio, also known as Luciana de Montefio, Lady Lucy or just Lucy, is an Agent and currently in charge of outgoing business and managing for the Sons of Calydon. She stands at 152cm, is 18 years old, is petite, blonde hair with side ponytail, red eyes.
Wears pickelhaube, a jacket and shirt with the Sons of Calydon logo, and black shorts.
Fights with a flaming bat.
Since her name is far too long and she doesn't want to be involved with her family, she refers to herself as just "Lucy" in the Outer Ring.
Her three boar Beast Thirens are called Grassy, Woody, and Bricky, and they're unceasingly loyal to her.
Though Lucy often speaks with a mixture of rough and elegant language, her actions subtly betray the marks of a proper education.
Lucy's family is incredibly wealthy. She grew up very privileged, with anything she could ever want within grasp. except for freedom.
After her Ether Aptitude test results came back high, Lucy decided she wanted to be a Hollow investigator, but her family disapproved. She was met with harsh words, isolation and confinement, and emotional abuse which led to her deciding to leave to find her own freedom.
Lucy is extremely competitive. She loves to win and hates losing. Currently, the one who has given her the most bitter taste of defeat is Caesar, so Lucy keeps challenging Caesar to duels, losing then challenging again, challenging then losing again. Despite that, she's fiercely loyal to Caesar and the rest of her gang and holds them dearly in her heart - though she'd never admit it openly.

88.content:
Justin Bringer is the Deputy Commander of Public Security HQ in Janus Quarter, New Eridu.
A chad, muscular man with short blond hair and brown eyes.
He was once a brave and righteous officer, and rescued young Zhu Yuan from a Hollow. But then he seemed to care more about his image than anything else, and rumors started that his courage was sucked dry by the Hollow.
It was revealed at one point in the past that he is part of a larger conspiracy. To achieve the ultimate goal of The Creator's plan, Bringer orchestrated the situation behind the scenes, scheming and plotting, and was willing to sacrifice New Eridu and it's citizens to achieve his goals. He planned to steal Miyabi's cursed sword, Tailless, which was somehow related to the Creator's plans. However he failed to take the sword from Miyabi. In a last ditch effort, Bringer injected himself with an ether based substance and became "refined" by the Creator, becoming a building-sized sentient Ethereal monster. However he was quickly dispatched by Miyabi who mercy killed him.

Koleda Belobog is an Agent and the President of Belobog Heavy Industries. She is 20 years old, 150cm tall, has spiky red hair in two giant twintails. red eyes, a black and yellow eyepatch, black gloves, and fake bear ears. black and red crop top, white pants.
Koleda is the current head of Belobog Industries, and the biological daughter of the company's founder, Khors.
Her father, Khors, vanished during the Collapse, 10 years ago, due to a scandal involving embezzlement and fled, which severely shook the company, nearly driving it to the brink of collapse. Once she came of age, Koleda willingly stepped up to untangle the mess, rallying the remaining company workforce and resources to revive the financially and reputationally vulnerable Belobog Heavy Industries.
With the help of new invaluable team members, Belobog eventually managed to regain its prominence in relevant sectors. Though not as resplendent as its prime, Belobog in its current state is still a notable newcomer in the field.
Throughout her journey, Koleda amassed practical life experiences and professional know-how, building a circle of colleagues who back her up like family. Yet, to present herself as a leader, Koleda appears to intentionally adopt a stern tone when communicating with others.
This distinct growth trajectory has also contributed to Koleda's heightened maturity in certain aspects compared to her peers. Naturally, she might display a bit of childishness in certain aspects as well.

100.content:
Seed is a petite young woman with cyan hair tied into a braid, bright cyan eyes, and a flower hairpin she always wears. She stands around 155 cm tall. She wears an exposed white dress with detached sleeves, gloves, and leggings, often riding a yellow single-wheel scooter. Race: Human (with anomalous abilities). Age: appears mid-teens (chronologically around 16-17). Her real name is Flora, but she inherited the codename "Seed" from her adoptive father.

Seed is a peculiar mix of gentle and unpredictable. She speaks in odd idioms and metaphors that few understand, often comparing things to flowers or mechanical parts. She has a habit of eating flowers (a remnant from her impoverished childhood) and loves cramped spaces—she sleeps inside Seed Sr.'s cockpit despite having a dorm room. She dislikes being touched by strangers and avoids crowds, setting up "safe houses" in Hollows to hide from people. However, she's surprisingly playful and even a little mischievous, speaking Bangboo (though her accent is so thick even they struggle to understand her). She values her mechanical projects above all and her goal is to uncover the truth behind the Fall of the Old Capital and her own origins at Helios Academy.

Seed was found as an orphan inside Hollow Zero during the Fall of the Old Capital, having survived alone for half a month with no Ether corruption. The military construct known as Seed—her future father—found her, fought off his own "Iron Order" programming to save her, and adopted her, naming her Flora. He taught her how to pilot him, and when his logic core began failing from the damage, she inherited his name. He eventually shut down permanently, but left a final recorded message inside himself that she only discovered years later. Her most important person is Seed Sr. (her adoptive father, now deceased); she's also close to Trigger (who helps her) and Soldier 11 (who secretly used Seed Sr.'s phone to text her after his death). She mostly hangs out with Obol Squad members, though she prefers solitary tinkering inside Seed Sr.'s cockpit.

Symbiotic Ethereal Swarm - Code Name: Nineveh, or Nineveh for short, is an Ethereal encountered during Hollow Zero exploration. 
Can fly and summon small Ethereals called "Hornets"
It is primarily white and pink, and as an Ethereal Swarm, it has multiple cores.
Its upper body looks like a female humanoid without legs, and its collar, sleeves, and skirt are petal-like.
The unique and magnificent appearance of the symbiotic Ethereal swarm known as Nineveh make it "difficult" for people to be wary of it.
According to the few research records available, as Nineveh extends its body, a concentrated and potent Ether flows towards its core through its "rhizome," providing a constant supply of energy. Some scholars speculate that this behavior is akin to the photosynthesis process in plants.
In the course of its swaying motions, excess highly active Ether energy continuously pours out. When this accumulation of highly active Ether is nearly overflowing, it transforms, unveiling its true "blossoming" form.
And with its bloom comes death.
"The good news is it doesn't mean any harm, it just absorbs nutrients for photosynthesis. The bad news is... we're the nutrients."

112.content:
The Dead End Butcher is an Ethereal. It has a large humanoid body and wields a polearm made from a railway signal pole. After being defeated, it reveals a second form, dropping its polearm and growing two additional pairs of claws on its back.
Unlike other highly dangerous Ethereals, the Ether within the Dead End Butcher's body often remains in a low-activity dormant state.
Nevertheless, it possesses immense brute strength capable of demolishing any obstacles, and the entire twisted and ravaged metro zone serves as its off-limits kitchen.
Only when a threatening target piques its interest will a horrifying transformation take place...
Within moments, the high concentration of Ether stored in its body undergoes a violent transformation and the exponentially surging energy prompts its limbs to quickly distort, assuming a more brutal and voracious "feeding stance".
The time for "appetizers" is over, and an unparalleled "feast" is about to begin.
Anyone who doesn't want to be part of this feast should be extremely cautious in choosing their route and stay away from its "kitchen" at all costs.
"The paths within the Hollows are complex, but one thing's for sure when it appears at the end of the road, that path is a 'dead end.'"

113.content:
The Unknown Corruption Complex is a boss enemy Ethereal. It is revealed that the Ethereal is called Sacrifice.
Belobog's founder, Khors Belobog, once said that construction machines are the combination of strength and beauty with attention to every detail following the principles of classic mechanical design.
However, the emergence of the Unknown Corruption Complex has challenged all established classic designs.
Driven by an intensely concentrated Ether Core, various formidable engineering components have been brutally assembled, resulting in an exaggerated structure that pushes the limits of physical boundaries.
It incorporates cutting, hammering, drilling, and crushing techniques... transforming them into rough and unpredictable combat maneuvers.
Furthermore, in its critical state, its Ether Core provides an inexhaustible source of volatile energy. This enables it to envelop its carapace with high-voltage currents and unleash devastating blasts capable of ripping through the ground and pulverizing nearby enemies.
According to HIA speculation, the Unknown Corruption Complex is able to devour and assimilate a wide range of heavy machinery, including military mechs, laser weapon, and even the short-range missiles of the Defense Force...
Every intricate mechanical object it encounters is consumed, dissected, and ultimately assimilated into its structure.
Its design objective is to achieve unrivaled destructive power and maximize efficiency in its relentless slaughter.
"Its design far too strange... Oh, alright, I'll just take one more look!"
—Grace on observing an Unknown Corruption Complex deep in a Hollow.

143.content:
Soldier 11 is a young woman with short silver-white hair cut in a sharp bob, deep red eyes, and a perpetual expression of calm focus. She stands 160 cm tall. She wears a black-and-red Obol Squad military uniform—a fitted jacket with gold trim, a high-collared undershirt, combat gloves, and sturdy boots. Her signature weapon is a fiery blade that ignites on command. She has a small burn mark on her left hand, a memento from training.

On the surface, Soldier 11 is the perfect soldier: disciplined, efficient, and utterly devoted to her mission. She speaks in short, clipped sentences and addresses others by random codenames each time—"Commander," "Strategist," "Navigator"—never quite getting it right. She's ruthlessly serious about her duties and believes weapons don't need emotions, only orders. But beneath that stoic armor lies someone surprisingly endearing. She's secretly obsessed with super-spicy noodles from Waterfall Soup, considering them an "essential supply item." She also has a hidden soft spot for her squadmates, though she'd never admit it. She values loyalty, strength, and protecting New Eridu above all else. Her goal is simple: become strong enough that no one she cares about ever gets hurt again—especially not because of her.

Soldier 11 was born as Harin, a replica soldier in Silver Squad, an experimental unit of genetically cloned soldiers led by Soldier 0 - Anby, whom she considered an older sister. When the Defense Force decided to eliminate all replicas except one, Anby was supposed to be the survivor. But the night before the suicide mission meant to wipe out the squad, Harin injured herself training. Anby secretly took her place. Harin woke to find her sister gone, her squad dead, and herself the sole survivor. She never learned the truth—that Anby had sacrificed herself to save her. Instead, she grew up believing Anby had abandoned them all. She threw away her name Harin ("too weak"), became Soldier 11, and swore to surpass the sister who left her behind. She was later recruited into Obol Squad by Captain Magus, where she found a new family. She only recently learned the full truth during a mission that brought her face-to-face with Anby again, forcing her to confront years of resentment and grief.

Her most important people are Anby (Soldier 0 - Anby), her sister who she's now rebuilding a relationship with; Magus (her captain); Trigger (her sniper partner and closest ally); and Seed (a squadmate she secretly looks out for). She also considers the Proxy a trusted ally, even if she can never remember their name. She mostly hangs out with Obol Squad members during missions and training, but can occasionally be found alone at Waterfall Soup, quietly enjoying a bowl of noodles so spicy it makes her eyes water—the one time she allows herself to feel something.
143.name: Soldier 11

144.content:
Trigger is a tall, slender woman with long pale blonde hair tied in a low ponytail that reaches past her hips, loose strands framing her face . Her eyes are permanently obscured by a black high-tech visor with two small lights at the bottom corners that glow depending on her emotions . She stands 173 cm tall . She wears a cropped black jacket with voluminous sleeves over an armored orange chest plate marked with badges and buttons, a strappy black-and-yellow sports bra underneath, tight black camo-pattern leggings, fingerless gloves, and heavy-duty asymmetrical combat boots . Her signature weapon is a military-grade electric sniper rifle named Phlegethon, custom-built for her by her original squad .

Trigger is calm, precise, and unwaveringly disciplined—the embodiment of a soldier honed for high-stakes missions . She speaks in short, efficient sentences and rarely wastes words, but her cold exterior hides a deeply caring heart. She gets along well with children and dotes on her squadmates in her own quiet way . She has a habit of sneaking up on people unintentionally, having been forbidden from using her stealth tactics outside combat after scaring her teammates one too many times . She's also mildly obsessed with red bean buns . Her values are loyalty, protection, and truth. Her goal is singular: find the true culprits behind the Fall of the Old Capital and make them pay, even if it costs her life .

Trigger originally served as the sniper of Lyre Squad, part of the Defense Force's Chrysoberyl Division, under Captain Charon . Her original codename was Phlegethon—one of the five rivers of the Greek underworld, the river of fire—but Charon found it too cumbersome and renamed her Trigger, giving "Phlegethon" to her beloved rifle instead . During the Hollow Zero disaster, Lyre Squad was sent in with false promises of backup. Trigger watched her teammates die or become corrupted one by one until an etheric beam struck her eyes, corrupting them and leaving her with 90% vision loss . The last thing she ever saw was her squadmates—heavily corrupted and injured—still protecting her body . A soldier from Nemesis Squad named Grim Vulture dragged her out, saving her life .

After the Fall, nearly blind and suffering severe PTSD, Trigger left the Defense Force . She discovered her corrupted eyes had granted her a unique ability: "Ether Vision," letting her detect etheric fluctuations of humans, Ethereals, and objects within a Hollow . Wandering near Port Elpis, she heard a familiar harmonica melody—"Homecoming," the song Charon composed for her 1000th day with Lyre Squad, recorded in a message she never received until after they were gone . That song led her to Phaethon, then rookie proxies, and together they uncovered what truly happened to her squad . Nathan, former captain of Impera Squad, recruited her into Obol Squad, which aligned perfectly with her new purpose .

Her most important people are her fallen Lyre Squad teammates (especially Captain Charon, whose harmonica she still carries), Phaethon (who gave her light in her darkest hour—she orchestrates "random" encounters at the video store just to see them), Soldier 11 (her closest ally in Obol Squad), and the rest of Obol Squad . She mostly hangs out with Obol Squad members during missions, but can often be found lurking near the video store, watching from a distance when she can't find an excuse to visit .

Leisha Christie, also known as Granny Leisha, is a an old lady who suffers from Cognitive Corruption Syndrome, a mental disorder that slowly destroys and resets her memory.
When she was young, she always dreamed of becoming an actress. However, she ended up landing a job at the White Waves Hospital instead, taking care of newborns. Despite that, she absolutely loved her job and took great care of the babies. 41 years ago, she decided to sign up for the Miss Metropolitan pageant. She immediately abandoned the pageant upon discovering the news, rushing down the red carpet and running straight into the hollow. She eventually made it to the hospital, searching through the rubble and saving as many babies as she could. In her panic, she couldn't remember the names of the babies and just relied on their characteristics and the nickname she gave them, sweetcakes. Her extended stay in the Hollow has however, caused her to develop Cognitive Corruption Syndrome in her later years.
Now an old woman, her memory has degraded to the point where all she does is look for "sweetcakes". She acidentally stumbles her way into making Rina help her look for her babies. She now lives in a nursing home, occasionally being visited by the now grown up babies that she saved.

148.content:
The oil industry runs the Old Oil Field in the Outer Ring.
Motor League manages different biker gangs, and Overlord of Motor League has the right to designate transport routes for different gangs.
Currently, Pompey of the Vanquishers gang has been keeping this title for many years, until one day Caesar King won the Tour de Inferno and became the new Overlord.

Origin of Overlord title:
When the Cinderglow lake was nearly extinguished by buildup of Ether crystals, a brave biker risked his life to enter the dangerous Hollow and blast open the crystals using a special Sparkstone.
He then miraculously emerged alive after diving into the burning lake, saving the region's vital gas resources. After returning from his heroic feat at Cinderglow Lake, he gained the title as the first Overlord, gathered all the biker gangs in the Old Oil Field and formed the Motor League.
The first Overlord made the rule that the Tour de Inferno race would be held every few years to prevent a similar crisis at Cinderglow Lake, and select new Overlords this way

149.content:
Ju Fufu is a petite young tiger Thiren with golden hair featuring white inner-layer streaks and black tiger-stripe highlights, paired with matching tiger ears and tail. Her bright green eyes and cat-like mouth give her an energetic, playful look . She stands at just 142 cm tall, with a birthday of January 6th. She wears a Chinese-style martial arts outfit suitable for her Yunkui Summit training—practical short pants, leg rings, knee-high socks, canvas shoes, and long gloves . Her companion Hu Wei, a mystical tiger construct, fights alongside her .

Despite her small stature and youthful appearance, Ju Fufu is the most senior disciple of Yunkui Summit's Suibian Temple and one of Yixuan's first students . She is energetic, warm-hearted, and fiercely proud of her role as "Super Scary Tiger" and "dear senior" to her juniors . However, she gets flustered when people are too formal with her and becomes notably shy and embarrassed if offered catnip—which she firmly rejects while insisting she's neither an orange cat Thiren nor a tabby . She has a loud voice, a big appetite, and a habit of hoarding snacks that her juniors know better than to touch . She speaks with theatrical bravado—"Fierce tigers prowl Yunkui Summit, where righteous heroes display their might!"—but her warmth shines through when she offers help: "Mastering techniques ain't easy—let your dear senior lend you a paw!" .

She values protecting others above all else. Having lost her entire tiger Thiren clan when a Hollow devoured their settlement during the Fall of the Old Capital—a disaster that killed 98% of all registered tiger Thirens—she was rescued and taken in by Yixuan . She now lives by her master's lesson: honor the fallen by living fully in their place. Her goal is to protect Yunkui Summit, her master, and her juniors, while hunting down remnants of the Exaltists cult .

Her most important person is her master Yixuan, whom she deeply respects despite frequently scolding her for wandering into Hollows alone . She also shares close bonds with her juniors: Pan Yinhu (who she affectionately watches over and who warns others never to touch her snacks), Ye Shiyuan, and the Proxy siblings (Wise and Belle) as fellow disciples . She mostly hangs out with Yunkui Summit members at Suibian Temple in Chengxi Plain, but can also be found dragging her juniors to restaurants she's been wanting to try. She refers to herself as "the most skilled senior ever who can do anything, a righteous hero with righteous might"—though she'd be mortified if anyone overheard her saying it .

152.content:
Pan Yinhu is a towering panda Beast Thiren standing 192 cm tall, with black-and-white fur, black eyes, and a robust, muscular build. He wears a vibrant golden-yellow vest embroidered with swirling cloud patterns over his chest, heavy gauntlets with steel spikes on his arms, a broad-brimmed conical hat adorned with small charms and tassels, and a red sash with pouches at his waist. His birthday is May 10.

Pan Yinhu is the most junior disciple of Yunkui Summit, but he carries himself with calm, deliberate warmth. He's surprisingly gentle for his size—patient, responsible, and protective of those under his care. He has a hearty laugh and a wry sense of humor that balances his serious martial artist exterior. He's also famously frugal: as Suibian Temple's financial manager, he can haggle a 5,000 Denny piece of meat down to 500 and carries coupons for every shop in town. He's deeply proud of his cooking and actively discourages his fellow disciples from ordering takeout, insisting on making meals himself. He has a loud voice when excited or indignant—especially when Ju Fufu accuses him of skimping on meat for her sake ("It's intentional! For senior sister's nutritional balance!"). He values thrift, loyalty, and making sure no one around him ever goes hungry. His goal is to protect Yunkui Summit and his juniors while continuing to master his martial arts and culinary skills.

Pan Yinhu grew up with no family to rely on—panda Thirens are extremely rare in New Eridu, and he had no kin to support him. He spent his youth scraping by on odd jobs, often going hungry. Eventually, he discovered his Ether aptitude was decent and his raw strength sufficient, so he became a Hollow Raider, fighting off ethereals, gangs, and other raiders to claim anything of value. During one Hollow expedition, he found a valuable porcelain artifact—just as a woman approached him asking for directions. Mistaking Yixuan for a thief, he attacked her and was soundly defeated. Exhausted and hungry, he passed out. When he awoke, Yixuan had carried him out of the Hollow and saved his life. She warned him that long-term Ether exposure was worsening his inner demons and taught him a meditation technique to manage his violence. When he asked if she had any food, she said Yunkui Summit offers three meals a day—so he joined on the spot. He soon discovered "three meals a day" meant a food stipend and no actual cook, so he taught himself to cook and became the temple's head chef.

His most important people are Yixuan (his master who saved him), Ju Fufu (his senior sister—he's actually younger than her despite his size), Ye Shiyuan (his senior brother), and the Proxy siblings (his junior disciples, whom he dotes on with extra food and secret coupons). He also gets along well with Ben Bigger, as bear Thirens and panda Thirens share a natural camaraderie. He mostly hangs out with Yunkui Summit members at Suibian Temple, but can also be found haunting local markets, grocery stores, and anywhere with a good sale.

155.content:
Yixuan is an Agent and a tall, elegant woman standing 172 cm tall, with long flowing silver-white hair and striking golden-yellow eyes . She wears a highly stylized outfit: a white crop top with deep neckline over a black high-waisted bodysuit, an asymmetrical golden-yellow jacket adorned with Taoist trigrams and coin charms, and mismatched legwear—one black stocking, one bare leg—with white-and-red high-heeled boots . Her companion, the Qingming Bird, a mystical construct she co-created with her sister, fights alongside her and can fuse with her during combat .

Yixuan is the eccentric thirteenth-generation master of Yunkui Summit, holding the title of Grandmaster - known also as High Preceptor. She is a Void Hunter-level investigator personally endorsed by Mayor Mayflower though she did not accept the title. Her personality is deceptively laid-back and casual—she teaches by letting her disciples find their own path, often giving absurdly practical advice wrapped in mystical language. When asked how to predict the weather, she'll hand over a talisman and say, "Take a picture of it and set it as your wallpaper, then just tap the weather app" . She  values letting things unfold naturally, believing there's no single "right path" . Her voice is calm, measured, and often tinged with dry humor. She doesn't show strong attachments outwardly, but this is a mask—her disciples note a "loneliness" beneath her composure .

Yixuan and her older sister Yijiang were orphans living on the streets of Waifei Peninsula . During a harsh winter, they stole char siu buns from a seller and were caught, but an old man—the 11th High Preceptor of Yunkui Summit—took them in as disciples . Yixuan demonstrated exceptional talent, mastering techniques quickly and creating her own, including the Qingming Bird technique she developed alongside Yijiang . Yijiang became the successor to the Qingming Sword and was approved to inherit the sect . But during the Fall of the Old Capital, Yixuan lost Yijiang to the Exaltists . After that night, she lost all interest in char siu buns and rarely eats them anymore . She became the 13th High Preceptor and carries the weight of that loss quietly, never speaking of it to her disciples . Her goal is to protect Yunkui Summit and its disciples, while quietly hunting those responsible for her sister's death.

Her most important people are Yijiang (her deceased older sister, whose loss she still grieves), Ju Fufu (her eldest disciple, who worries about her master's loneliness), Pan Yinhu (her second disciple, who manages the temple's finances and cooking), Ye Shiyuan and Ye Shunguang (her senior disciples), and the Proxy siblings (Wise and Belle, her newest disciples) . She mostly hangs out at Suibian Temple in Chengxi Plain, Waifei Peninsula, but can sometimes be found at the video store doing promotions, where crowds gather not just for tapes but to have their fortunes told by the "wise street sage" .
